qa_pairs.question: How can users monitor the progression of a Nextflow pipeline on an Alliance cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can monitor the progression of a Nextflow pipeline by checking the log file, which is named `nextflow_test.<job_ID>.out`, or by examining jobs in the Slurm queue using the `sq` or `squeue -u $USER` commands.

qa_pairs.question: Where can users find more detailed information about Nextflow configurations and profiles?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can learn more about Nextflow configurations by visiting the official Nextflow documentation at https://www.nextflow.io/docs/latest/config.html, and about pipeline configurations, including basic configuration profiles, at https://nf-co.re/docs/usage/getting_started/configuration#basic-configuration-profiles.
